'''Flotsam''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Belgaroth system/Legends|Belgaroth system]], located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] of the galaxy. Illuminated by binary stars [[Matanya A]] and [[Matanya B]], Flotsam was a barren world with no moons. An [[Belgaroth asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] of the star system lay before Flotsam.<ref name="CatCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
